name: OpenAI
hiring_signals: Consistently hiring for research, safety, and product roles
Expanding internationally with US as HQ
culture_notes: Mission-driven: AGI safety first
Fast-moving, high expectations, elite research culture
interview_process: Technical screen, then systems design or ML fundamentals, then research presentation for research roles

name: Anthropic
hiring_signals: Rapidly scaling safety and product teams
Heavy hiring in SF and remote
culture_notes: Safety-first AI research culture
Collaborative, low-ego, academic feel with startup pace
interview_process: Coding screen, ML system design, research deep-dive for scientists, values-alignment interview

name: Google DeepMind
hiring_signals: Merged Google Brain and DeepMind, actively hiring across both orgs
Strong hiring in NYC and Mountain View
culture_notes: Research-heavy, long-term thinking
Academic pedigree valued, strong publication culture
interview_process: Multiple coding rounds, ML theory, research presentation, Googleyness behavioral round

name: Meta AI
hiring_signals: FAIR and GenAI orgs both hiring
Open source LLM investments driving headcount growth
culture_notes: Move fast culture, strong eng-driven decisions
Open source commitment — LLaMA releases signal research openness
interview_process: Coding (LeetCode hard), systems design, ML design, behavioral — 5-6 rounds total

name: Microsoft
hiring_signals: AI integration across all product lines driving massive hiring
Azure AI and Copilot teams expanding rapidly
culture_notes: Growth mindset culture under Nadella
Collaborative, large org with many internal mobility paths
interview_process: Coding screen, design round, behavioral with STAR, as appropriate loop (4-5 rounds)

name: NVIDIA
hiring_signals: GPU demand driving eng and research hiring at all levels
CUDA, networking, and AI software teams all expanding
culture_notes: High performance, detail-oriented engineering culture
Long tenures, strong compensation, competitive but collaborative
interview_process: Deep technical rounds: GPU architecture, CUDA programming, systems design, C++ proficiency

name: Databricks
hiring_signals: MosaicML acquisition expanded AI research team
Lakehouse + AI platform driving strong growth
culture_notes: Engineer-led, customer-obsessed
Strong technical culture, open source roots (Apache Spark)
interview_process: Coding screen, distributed systems design, ML platform design, behavioral

name: Scale AI
hiring_signals: Government and enterprise contracts driving rapid headcount growth
RLHF and data engine teams expanding
culture_notes: Execution-obsessed, fast-paced startup culture
High ownership expected at every level
interview_process: Coding screen, product sense or systems design depending on role, behavioral

name: Waymo
hiring_signals: Expanding robotaxi fleet driving hiring across all eng disciplines
Perception, planning, and simulation teams all growing
culture_notes: Safety-first, rigorous engineering culture
Google heritage — structured, data-driven, process-oriented
interview_process: Coding, systems design, domain-specific ML or robotics rounds, behavioral

name: Palantir
hiring_signals: AIP (AI Platform) launch driving significant product and eng hiring
Government and commercial divisions both expanding
culture_notes: Mission-driven, intense culture — work is taken very seriously
Strong opinions on building software that matters, not just software
interview_process: Decomp exercise (product problem solving), coding, systems design, culture fit — unique process

name: xAI
hiring_signals: $20B funding round Jan 2026 from Nvidia, Cisco, Fidelity — rapidly expanding team
Building Grok and AGI infrastructure, headcount growing fast from 200+
culture_notes: AGI-focused, Elon Musk-led, extremely high-bar hiring
Integrated with X/Twitter platform, fast-moving and mission-intense
interview_process: Deep technical bar: ML fundamentals, systems, coding — similar rigor to top AI labs

name: Anysphere (Cursor)
hiring_signals: $1B ARR in 24 months, $29.3B valuation Nov 2025 — one of fastest growing SaaS ever
$2.3B Series D, 500K+ developers using product daily
culture_notes: Small elite team (~300 people) moving extremely fast
Engineering-driven, product quality obsessed, strong word-of-mouth culture
interview_process: High bar coding, product thinking, systems design — lean team so every hire is high impact

name: Perplexity AI
hiring_signals: $20B valuation Sep 2025, 100M+ monthly users — scaling product and infra teams
Hiring across engineering, research, and growth
culture_notes: Fast-paced, small team culture with high autonomy
Research meets consumer product — academic rigour with startup speed
interview_process: Coding screen, ML systems design, product thinking round, culture fit

name: Mistral AI
hiring_signals: $14B valuation Sep 2025, doubled from $6B in under a year
Open-source model releases driving enterprise adoption across Europe and US
culture_notes: Research-first, open-source committed culture
Founded by ex-Google DeepMind and Meta researchers — academic pedigree, startup speed
interview_process: ML theory and systems deep dive, coding, research background discussion

name: Cognition AI
hiring_signals: $10.2B valuation, grew from $1M to $73M ARR in under a year
Devin autonomous coding agent gaining strong enterprise traction
culture_notes: Small elite team, extremely high technical bar
Autonomous agent focus — building software that writes software
interview_process: Extremely rigorous: competitive programming background valued, deep ML systems knowledge required

name: Sierra
hiring_signals: $10B valuation Sep 2025, $100M ARR in under 2 years
Co-founded by ex-Salesforce co-CEO Bret Taylor — credibility driving enterprise deals
culture_notes: Enterprise-grade culture with startup speed
Customer-obsessed, founders with deep Salesforce and Google backgrounds set the tone
interview_process: Product and systems rounds, strong emphasis on customer empathy and enterprise thinking

name: Cerebras Systems
hiring_signals: $8.1B valuation, $1.1B Series G Sep 2025, delayed IPO for stronger 2026 listing
Wafer-scale chip manufacturing requires deep hardware engineering talent
culture_notes: Deep hardware engineering culture — builds the world's largest AI chips
Competitive with Nvidia, research and engineering driven
interview_process: Deep hardware architecture, VLSI, systems programming, C/C++ proficiency

name: Harvey
hiring_signals: $8B valuation Dec 2025, highest-valued legal AI startup
10,000+ legal professionals using platform — rapid law firm adoption
culture_notes: Domain-expert culture — deep collaboration between legal and engineering
High standards for accuracy, built on top of frontier models with legal fine-tuning
interview_process: Coding screen, domain-specific ML design, product thinking, legal workflow understanding

name: Glean
hiring_signals: $7.2B valuation, doubled ARR from $100M to $200M in 9 months
1,000+ enterprise customers including Databricks, Reddit, Duolingo
culture_notes: Customer-obsessed, enterprise-grade culture
Founded by ex-Google search engineers — deep search and ML expertise valued
interview_process: Coding, information retrieval systems design, ML relevance and ranking, behavioral

name: Cohere
hiring_signals: $7B valuation, $100M ARR in 2025, focused on enterprise and sovereign AI
Founded by Google Brain alumni — strong research hiring pipeline
culture_notes: Enterprise-first, no consumer distraction
Canadian roots with US expansion — collaborative academic-meets-startup culture
interview_process: ML fundamentals, NLP systems design, coding, enterprise product thinking

name: Hugging Face
hiring_signals: $4.5B valuation, 500K+ models hosted, used by Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon
Open source community of 50,000+ organizations driving platform growth
culture_notes: Open source first — every contribution is public and community-driven
Distributed remote team across US and Europe, collaborative and research-forward
interview_process: Coding, open source contribution history valued, ML systems, community and culture alignment

name: Lambda Labs
hiring_signals: $4B+ valuation, $1.5B Series E Nov 2025 backed by Nvidia
Multibillion-dollar Microsoft deal driving infrastructure scaling
culture_notes: GPU cloud infrastructure culture — hardcore systems engineering
Alternative to hyperscalers positioning drives scrappy, builder mentality
interview_process: Distributed systems design, cloud infrastructure, networking, coding screen

name: Together AI
hiring_signals: $3.3B valuation, Nvidia-backed, 10,000+ developers on platform
Open model cloud positioning driving strong developer adoption
culture_notes: Developer-first culture, strong open source commitment
Research and platform engineering blend — academic founders, startup execution
interview_process: ML systems design, distributed inference, coding, platform thinking

name: Runway
hiring_signals: $3B+ valuation, used by A24 Films and major studios, 10M+ creators
$308M Series D led by General Atlantic — scaling research and product
culture_notes: Creative meets technical — designers, artists, and engineers collaborate closely
Research-driven video generation with strong creator community feedback loop
interview_process: ML research for scientists, full-stack or infra for engineers, product portfolio for PMs

name: Writer
hiring_signals: $1.9B valuation, unicorn status, customers include Accenture, Uber, Spotify
Enterprise governance and compliance focus driving Fortune 500 adoption
culture_notes: Enterprise-grade culture with emphasis on security and compliance
Customer success driven — deep partnership with large accounts
interview_process: Coding, enterprise product design, content AI systems, behavioral with ownership emphasis

name: Thinking Machines Lab
hiring_signals: $2B seed round at $12B valuation Jul 2025, in talks for $50-60B valuation by end of 2025
Founded by ex-OpenAI CTO Mira Murati — attracting top AI talent fast
culture_notes: Pre-product stealth mode — pure research and foundational AI building culture
Small team, extremely high bar, long-term AGI focus
interview_process: Deep ML research background, frontier model knowledge, systems thinking — stealth so limited public info

name: Safe Superintelligence (SSI)
hiring_signals: $2B round at $32B valuation Apr 2025 led by Alphabet despite zero revenue
Co-founded by Ilya Sutskever (ex-OpenAI chief scientist) — top AI safety talent magnet
culture_notes: Pure safety research culture, no product pressure
Small (~50 people) elite team — stealth, mission-driven, long time horizon
interview_process: Frontier ML research bar — publications, safety research background, theoretical depth valued

name: Character.AI
hiring_signals: 20M+ monthly active users, Google invested $2.7B via reverse acquihire
Platform continues operating independently with strong user growth
culture_notes: Consumer entertainment culture — creative, user-experience driven
Fast feedback loop from massive user base shapes product direction
interview_process: Coding screen, ML systems, product and consumer thinking, culture fit

name: Ambience Healthcare
hiring_signals: $243M Series C 2025, deployed at UCSF Health and Memorial Hermann
Clinical documentation AI reducing physician burnout — strong hospital system adoption
culture_notes: Mission-driven healthcare culture — clinician empathy is core to product decisions
Andreessen Horowitz backed, high standards for accuracy and safety in clinical settings
interview_process: Coding, healthcare ML systems design, HIPAA/compliance awareness, behavioral

name: Groq
hiring_signals: LPU inference chips outperforming GPUs on speed — strong industry buzz driving hiring
Partnerships with major cloud providers expanding go-to-market team
culture_notes: Hardware-first culture, obsessed with inference speed and efficiency
Smaller team, high ownership, contrarian bet against Nvidia dominance
interview_process: Deep hardware architecture or compiler engineering rounds, systems design, coding

name: ElevenLabs
hiring_signals: Fastest voice AI adoption in market — publishers, game studios, and creators all onboarding
International expansion driving localization and infra hiring
culture_notes: Small team, extremely fast iteration — product updates ship weekly
Research and product deeply intertwined, strong voice AI community
interview_process: Coding screen, audio ML systems design, product thinking for PMs, culture fit

name: Replit
hiring_signals: Replit Agent launched — strong developer adoption driving product and infra scaling
Moving from IDE to autonomous software builder, reshaping team composition
culture_notes: Developer community-first culture with 20M+ users giving direct feedback
Remote-friendly, high autonomy, builder mentality throughout
interview_process: Coding, product thinking, dev tools systems design, culture and ownership behavioral

name: Weights & Biases
hiring_signals: MLOps category leader with strong enterprise and research adoption
Weave (LLM observability) expanding total addressable market significantly
culture_notes: Researcher-friendly culture — dogfoods own tools internally
Remote-first, strong open source contributions, community-driven roadmap
interview_process: Coding, ML experiment tracking systems design, customer empathy rounds for GTM roles

name: Pinecone
hiring_signals: Vector database category leader powering thousands of RAG applications
Enterprise deals accelerating as AI apps move to production
culture_notes: Infrastructure engineering culture — reliability and performance are non-negotiable
Remote-first, strong focus on developer experience and documentation
interview_process: Distributed systems design, database internals, coding, customer scenario rounds for GTM

name: Figure AI
hiring_signals: $2.6B raised, BMW partnership for factory deployment — hardware and software hiring accelerating
Figure 02 humanoid robot in production, scaling manufacturing team
culture_notes: Extremely high bar, hardware-meets-AI culture — shipping physical products with zero margin for error
Ambitious and intense — building human-level robots is the explicit mission
interview_process: Robotics, controls, perception, or full-stack eng depending on role — deep domain knowledge required

name: Aurora Innovation
hiring_signals: Aurora Driver commercially launching on Texas freight routes — scaling ops and eng teams
Post-Uber ATG and Lyft Level 5 acquisitions brought deep AV talent
culture_notes: Safety-first AV culture with strong research roots
Public company (NASDAQ: AUR) — more structured than pure startup, still moves fast on product
interview_process: Coding, AV-specific domain rounds (perception, planning, mapping), systems design, behavioral

name: Snowflake
hiring_signals: Cortex AI platform driving net-new AI engineering hiring across all divisions
Every data workload becoming an AI workload — strong tailwinds for all teams
culture_notes: Enterprise data culture — reliability, scale, and customer obsession
Public company with startup energy maintained through aggressive product bets
interview_process: Coding (SQL + Python), distributed systems design, data platform architecture, behavioral STAR

name: ServiceNow
hiring_signals: Now Assist (GenAI suite) driving significant net-new engineering hiring
AI automation across every enterprise workflow — product teams expanding rapidly
culture_notes: Enterprise software culture focused on reliability and customer success
Strong internal mobility, large org with clear career ladders
interview_process: Coding screen, enterprise systems design, behavioral STAR, product-specific round

name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
hiring_signals: Publicly traded AI drug discovery company scaling data and ML teams
Partnership with NVIDIA for BioNeMo driving compute and AI research hiring
culture_notes: Science-first culture that treats drug discovery as a data problem
Interdisciplinary — biologists, chemists, and ML engineers collaborate daily
interview_process: ML for biology systems design, coding, domain knowledge in drug discovery or genomics, behavioral

name: Tempus AI
hiring_signals: Publicly traded (NASDAQ: TEM), genomics and clinical AI at scale
Expanding AI platform across oncology, cardiology, and psychiatry
culture_notes: Data-driven clinical culture — decisions backed by genomic and real-world evidence
Mission-oriented around improving cancer outcomes, strong sense of purpose
interview_process: Coding, healthcare data systems design, clinical ML, HIPAA awareness, behavioral

name: CrowdStrike
hiring_signals: Charlotte AI (GenAI security platform) driving significant product and research hiring
Post-outage recovery with increased focus on reliability and threat detection
culture_notes: Security-first culture — threat intelligence is a core company differentiator
Fast-moving for a public company, engineering teams operate with startup urgency
interview_process: Coding, security systems design, behavioral — security domain knowledge a plus

name: Weaviate
hiring_signals: Open-source vector database with strong cloud offering growing fast
Enterprise contracts accelerating as production AI apps scale
culture_notes: Open-source first, remote-friendly, European roots with global team
Developer community deeply shapes product roadmap — community PRs welcomed
interview_process: Distributed systems design, database internals, Go or Python coding, customer empathy rounds

name: Inflection AI
hiring_signals: $1.3B Series B from Microsoft, Bill Gates, Nvidia — infrastructure scale signals ambition
Pi assistant at 6M+ users, building personalized AI at consumer scale
culture_notes: Co-founded by Reid Hoffman and Mustafa Suleyman — strong strategic and research leadership
Long-term personalization research culture, not chasing benchmarks
interview_process: ML research and systems rounds, product thinking for consumer AI, behavioral

name: Adept AI
hiring_signals: $415M raised, agentic AI for software task automation gaining enterprise traction
Amazon hired founding team — company continues operating with strong AI agent roadmap
culture_notes: Pioneer in action-taking AI agents — deep belief in AI that does, not just talks
Research and product closely intertwined, small high-ownership team
interview_process: Coding, agent systems design, ML fundamentals, product thinking for complex workflows

name: Replicate
hiring_signals: 10,000+ developers running open-source models via API — strong developer adoption
$40M Series B led by a16z, building the default platform for model deployment
culture_notes: Small team (~50), high ownership, deeply developer-empathetic culture
Open source community is a first-class stakeholder in product decisions
interview_process: Coding, cloud infrastructure systems design, developer experience thinking, behavioral

name: World Labs
hiring_signals: $291.5M raised, founded by Fei-Fei Li — top spatial intelligence and 3D AI talent target
Pre-product with strong research direction — hiring research-first roles
culture_notes: Academic-caliber research culture led by one of AI's most respected figures
Small team, long-term vision on embodied and spatial AI
interview_process: Deep research background in computer vision, 3D understanding, or embodied AI required

name: Jasper AI
hiring_signals: $1.8B valuation, 1.8M monthly users, customers include IBM, Canva, Logitech
Marketing-first AI platform expanding into enterprise workflow automation
culture_notes: Marketing and content-focused culture — creative professionals shape product priorities
Strong customer success culture — high-touch enterprise relationships
interview_process: Coding for engineers, product and content thinking for PMs, GTM rounds for sales

name: Crusoe
hiring_signals: $10B+ valuation, $1.375B Series E — building 1.2GW AI campus, massive infra hiring
OpenAI and Oracle partnerships signal strategic importance
culture_notes: Energy-first infrastructure culture — sustainability and compute efficiency are core values
Large-scale data center engineering — significant hardware and power systems expertise
interview_process: Infrastructure systems design, networking, power systems or cloud engineering, coding, behavioral

name: Fathom
hiring_signals: 200,000+ users across sales and customer success teams, $17M Series A
Bot-free meeting transcription differentiator driving strong word-of-mouth growth
culture_notes: User-obsessed product culture — NPS-driven development
Small team, high ownership, async-friendly work style
interview_process: Coding, product thinking, customer empathy rounds, behavioral
